title: Enhanced FIB-SEM systems for large-volume 3D imaging
abstract: Enhanced focused ion beam scanning electron microscopy (FIB-SEM) systems optimized for large-volume 3D biological imaging. Introduces hardware and software improvements that enable reliable long-duration FIB-SEM imaging of tissue volumes spanning hundreds of micrometers with isotropic resolution of 8 nm or better, making large-scale connectomic reconstructions feasible.
notes: Key FIB-SEM technology paper enabling large-volume connectomics.
